user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new presenter panel with description, locations and topics, so that qualified presenters are assigned to orientation topics
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Presenter Panel screen; When I click Add new presenter panel and enter the panel details; Then the new panel is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view presenter panels in a list showing panel, description, locations and topics, so that I can review who presents each orientation topic
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Presenter Panel screen; When the page loads; Then panels are listed with Panel, Description, Location(s) and Topic(s) columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing presenter panel, so that I can update presenters, locations or topic assignments
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Presenter Panel screen; When I click Edit on a panel row; Then I can modify and save the panel details

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to associate a presenter panel with specific topics and locations, so that presenters are matched to the right orientation sessions
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a presenter panel; When I select topics and locations; Then the associations are saved with the panel

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the presenter panel list, so that I can navigate all panels and see current data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Presenter Panel screen; When I use the paging controls or click Refresh; Then the list navigates or reloads accordingly
